titleStmt.title: SII 24.559: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 559. (A.R. No. 83 of 1936-37.) WEST WALL OF THE MĒṬṬAḺAGIYAŚIṄGAR SHRINE.

summary.p: Records gift of land by purchase by Raṅgaśāyi, son of Chauṇḍarāja of Tōṭṭappalli, for offerings to the god while the deity halted in the four-pillared maṇḍapa built by the donor on the festival day named after Bhūpati-Uḍaiyār. The details of date viz. Śaka 1611, Vibhava, Mīna śu. 6, Saturday, Rōhiṇī correspond to A.D. 1689, March 16, Saturday: ·81, ·34.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī . śakābdam 1000 6 100 1 Itu mel cellāniṉṟa vipavanāma samvatsarattu minaṉāyattu pūrvapakṣattu ṣaṣṭiyum sthiravāsaramum peṟṟa rohiṇi nakṣatrattuṉāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭiyakula Aśani vaḷanāṭṭu
viḻāvaṟā vitivaḷaṉāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkaṉtiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganādhadevar śrīpaṇṭā rattukku Aṭiyeṉ bhāradvāja gotrattu Āśvalāyana sūtrattu ka śākhāddhyāyarāna toṭṭappalli cavuṇṭa
rācar pūtran raṅkacāyiyen daṇṭan samarprittu poliyiṭu cilaraśāsanam paṇṇik koṭuttapaṭi . Aṭiyeṉuṭa Upayamāka ṉācciyār śrīraṅganaracciyārammaṉ koyilukku teṉ pāricam kulacekaraṉ vitiyil kaṭṭivittapaṭi ṉā
lukāl maṇṭapattil pūpati Uṭaiyār tiruṉāḷ Āṟāntiruṉāḷaikku nam perumāḷ Eṟi Aṟuḷukaiyil tirukkuttu maṇiviḷakku tiruvantikāppukkum neyipaṭi 3kku pu3 tiṟtattukku Elam palam 2- kku pu1 Amutu ceytaruḷum poṉak kū 4 cema kūli 2 Āka kūli
6- kku poṉ 4 pu8 pori Ūn=tukku pon_ 2 pu� tocai 3 100kku poṉ 4 vaṭai 3 100- kku poṉ 3 Atiracam 3 100- kku poṉ 5 veccu kūṉ 10- kkupoṉ 3 pānakam kūṉ 3 10- kku poṉ 3 ciṟappu pataku paṭi campā ç 2 10- kkupoṉ 6 paṭai kū neypaṭi 2- kku pu 2 paruppu U 6- kku
pu 4 kaṟiyamutu vāḻaikkāy kattārikkāy pākarkāy palākāy vilai poṉ 1pu 2 Uppu pu (1/2) miḷaku palacampāram vellam vilai pu 3 tirumpa parimāṟa ney paṭi 1- kku pu1 teṅkāy 5 10- kku pu3 vāḻaippaḻam 2 100- kku pu- 2 Iḷanir100- kku pu4
karumpu 100- kku pu4 cantaṇam paṭi 10- kku pu3 pākku palam 4 10- kkum Ilaiyamutu 5 100- kkum pu4 tirumālai n=ta vilai pu2 pāvāṭai tirumuṉ kāṇikkai tirumaṇṭapam kāvaṇam poṭa Āḷ kūli pu- 5 10 1”cūlam ce ṉ cumaitali pu- 1 pan=tattukku neypaṭi 3 10- kku ṭai Iṭai 6 yam piṭi kūli pu 6 Āka maṇṭapakaṭṭaḷai poṉ
ceytaruḷum Upaiyam 1- kku vaṭaipparuppu paḻam teṅkāy Arivāṇam 4- kkum pāṉakam kūṉ kkum pu5- kku Āka Upayam 2 10 6- kku poṉ 10 4 pu3 Āka maṇṭapa kaṭṭaḷai Upaiyam Uḷpaṭa poṉ 5 10 6 Intap poṉ Aṉpattārum poliyūṭṭu vaṭṭatu vaṭakarai muciṟikku meṟku Eṅka l caṟuvamāniya Aṭiyeṉuṭa paṅku ṉālukku
ṅka nallūr Uḷkkaṭai cittar kuṭiccey 10 4- kku poṉ 10000 2 1000- kku poṉ 100 2 10 poṉ Āka 5 10 6 Innilam tiruvāḻikkellum poṭṭu koyil śrīpaṇṭārattile cettapaṭiyiṉāle Inta dharmmam Ādicamdraāditya varayum naṭakkakkaṭavatākavum Itukku Uṇṭāna viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu Uttamanampi piḷḷai Ayyaṉ piṟakkaṭavar kaḷākavum [-111]
Digital edition of SII 24.559 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
